general: A merchant caravan went missing on the northern road three days ago.
The old mill at the edge of town hasn't turned its wheel in over a year.
Someone has been leaving flowers on the old cemetery wall every morning.
A traveling merchant claims to have seen a dragon flying over the eastern mountains.
The well in the town square went dry last month and no one knows why.
Children have been whispering about a strange light in the abandoned tower.
The blacksmith's apprentice disappeared last week and has not been found.
A local farmer claims his livestock is being stolen, but no tracks are ever found.
The alchemist on Market Row has been acting strangely lately.
An old woman says a ghost walks the riverbank every new moon.
The mayor's daughter ran away with a traveling performer.
Someone has been painting strange symbols on doors at night.
The baker's bread has been rising unusually large lately.
A pack of wild dogs has been seen hunting near the town walls after dark.
The town crier has been speaking in riddles for the past week.
A stranger in a black cloak has been sitting alone at the tavern every night.
The old bridge over Greatham Creek is said to collapse by next winter.
Several residents report hearing deep drumming from underground.
A traveling monk claims the town is built on cursed ground.
The butcher has been receiveing deliveries of meat from an unknown source.
A local drunkard swears he saw the dead walk near the old battlefield.
The town's grain reserves are lower than the steward admits.
Someone has been vandalizing the temple of the harvest god.
A noble from the capital has been asking questions about the old magistrate.
The fishing boats are returning with empty nets for the third week running.
An herbalist discovered a rare flower growing in the ruins outside town.
The town guard has doubled its patrols without explanation.
A series of small fires have broken out in the warehouse district.
Children have been vanishing for hours and returning with no memory of where they went.
The old lighthouse keeper claims to have seen ships that vanish into fog.
A dispute between two noble families is threatening to erupt into violence.
The local miller has been charging nearly double his usual rate.
Someone has been distributing anonymous pamphlets criticizing the town council.
The hedge wizard on Penwood Lane has not been seen in over a week.
A prized mare was stolen from the lord's stable last night.
The traveling puppet show left town suddenly in the middle of the night.
Fish in the river have been dying and floating belly-up.
A retired adventurer has taken up residence at the inn and is looking for work.
The town well in the eastern quarter has turned brackish and foul.
Someone has been stealing from the temple coffers for months.
An earthquake shook the town last month, though seismologists claim none occurred.
The old sage in the tower has been burning strange-smelling incense day and night.
A group of pilgrims passed through town asking about an ancient shrine.
The constable has been dismissing complaints without investigation.
Someone is secretly buying up all properties along the riverfront.
The carnival that came to town left behind a locked wagon no one can open.
A fire at the tanner's shop killed two workers under mysterious circumstances.
The town archives lost an entire shelf of records to a water leak.
Several people claim to have dreamed the same nightmare about drowning.
A foreign diplomat has been staying at the inn under a false name.
The old clock tower struck thirteen times at midnight last Tuesday.
A bounty hunter has been seen lurking around the east gate.
The dye works has been dumping waste upstream, poisoning the water.
Someone carved a warning into the door of the town hall overnight.
The harvest this year is the worst anyone can remember.
A traveling merchant is selling artifacts that look like they came from a tomb.
The old church bell rings on its own before every storm.
A fight broke out at the tavern after someone accused a patron of being an imposter.
The wool merchant's warehouse was found full of cobwebs and dust despite recent deliveries.
An old man claims he once mapped tunnels beneath the town.
The lamplighter has refused to light the lower quarter's lamps for a month.
A woman matching the description of a wanted assassin was seen near the docks.
The pottery kiln exploded last week, killing the potter's apprentice.
Someone has been feeding stray cats near the temple at dawn.
The watch captain has been gambling heavily and owes money to dangerous people.
A child was born last month with silver eyes, and the midwife refuses to speak of it.
The old fort on the hill has a new occupant who waves no flag.
Fishermen have been catching strange eels with too many teeth.
A traveling scholar is offering gold for any information about the old keep.
The town's oldest tree split down the middle during a windless night.
Several beggars claim to see a figure standing on the rooftops at midnight.
The silk merchant has been importing bolts with a strange symbol stitched into the lining.
A retired soldier has been drinking himself to death at the Broken Wheel tavern.
The herbalist's garden is growing plants that shouldn't exist in this climate.
Someone has been stealing copper from rooftops across town.
The old well behind the blacksmith's shop has begun bubbling again.
A traveling priest has been preaching that the town will face divine judgment.
The town's only scribe has fallen ill and cannot write for the first time in forty years.
Someone wearing a porcelain mask has been seen walking the streets at twilight.
The old lord's portrait in the manor has begun weeping.
A bounty on wolves has been posted, yet no wolves have been seen in years.
The armorer claims someone tried to break into his vault twice this month.
Children have been playing a new game in the streets that no adult recognizes.
The cheese merchant has been aging his product in a cave that no one knew existed.
A woman in white has been seen standing in the cemetery facing east.
The town's water supply has a faint taste of iron that was not there before.
An old adventurer's sword was pulled from a stone in the market, and no one owns it.
The baker's youngest son claims he can hear voices coming from the oven.
Someone has moved into the house on Crooked Lane that has been empty for a decade.
The town's midsummer celebration has been cancelled for reasons no one will explain.
A flock of ravens has been circling the old chapel for three days.
The cobbler has been making boots that last twice as long as normal.
A sealed letter was nailed to the temple door with no sender named.
The old fisherman caught something in his net that he refuses to describe.
Someone has been leaving small offerings of honey at the crossroads.
The town records show a building on High Street that does not exist.
A ghost ship was spotted on the northern horizon last night.
The mayor has been meeting with hooded visitors behind closed doors.
An entire family vanished from their home and only their dinner remained.
The old woman at the crossroads has been giving out lottery numbers that come true.
Someone has been testing the town walls with a pickaxe at night.
The temple bells have been ringing in a pattern that deaf people can hear.
A group of soldiers marched through town and camped outside the walls.
The town's oldest resident claims she saw the same events happen fifty years ago.
A new door appeared in the cellar of the old tavern overnight.
The saddler has been crafting horse armor for a buyer no one has seen.
Someone has been mapping the town's drainage system at night.
The traveling minstrel sang a song that made three people faint.
A sealed crate marked with foreign characters washed up on the riverbank.
The old hedge maze behind the manor has grown overnight and no one tends it.
Someone has been poisoning stray dogs with a white powder.
The town council has been holding closed sessions every night this week.
A child's laughter echoes from the abandoned mine shaft every dusk.
quest_hooks: Deep in the Thornwood Forest, a cairn has begun glowing with pale blue light.
A sealed mine tunnel collapsed last week and something inside is trying to dig out.
An old map was found in a bottle on the riverbank, leading to a forgotten island crypt.
A dying courier clutched a bloodstained letter warning of an ambush on the king's road.
The old keep on Raven Hill has begun emitting a low hum that can be felt for miles.
A child fell through a cellar floor and found a hidden chamber filled with bones.
A dragon was sighted roosting in the volcanic peak to the north.
A sealed vault beneath the cathedral has begun dripping black ichor.
The ghost of a drowned sailor walks the docks every night carrying a sealed chest.
A merchant caravan returning from the eastern passes brought back a cursed idol.
An abandoned monastery in the hills has begun ringing its bells again.
A wailing sound echoes from the abandoned mine every full moon.
A sealed tomb has been found beneath the village well.
An ancient sword embedded in stone has begun to vibrate before dawn each day.
A ship crashed on the rocks offshore, its crew replaced by empty clothes.
A hunter tracked a strange beast to a cave but never returned.
The old wizard's tower in the marsh has reappeared after vanishing for a century.
A circle of standing stones has begun to rearrange itself every night.
A dwarven expedition sent into the deep mines has gone silent.
An abandoned war machine was found moving itself across the moor.
A child's toy was found floating in the well, but no child is missing.
The old lord's tomb was found open from the inside, and the body is gone.
A sealed letter from thirty years ago was found in a church wall mentioning a buried treasure.
A fiendish cult has been spotted meeting in the sewers beneath the merchant quarter.
A magical portal opened briefly in the market square and vomited out a single armored arm.
An earthquake revealed a colossal skeleton buried beneath the eastern farmlands.
A forest fire burned in a perfect circle and left ancient ruins visible at its center.
A sealed chest in the town hall basement has begun knocking rhythmically.
A black tower materialized overnight on the horizon, visible only at dawn.
The old dragon's lair beneath Smokepeak Mountain has been reoccupied.
A sealed crypt in the cemetery has a new inscription that appears each morning.
A knight in rusted armor rides the northern road but attacks anyone who approaches.
A village elder claims a sword must be returned to the bottom of a sacred lake by midsummer or disaster will follow.
Merchants on the eastern road report a toll collector who vanishes when challenged.
A passing scholar discovered an ancient prophecy matching current events.
The statue of a forgotten god in the market square bled from its eyes last week.
A sealed cavern beneath the old chapel contains murals depicting a great evil rising.
A merchant's wagon was found destroyed on the road, its goods untouched but rearranged into a pattern.
The old enchanted forest has begun encroaching on farmland at an alarming rate.
A sealed jar was fished from the river containing a screaming face that disappeared at dawn.
A lone survivor from a destroyed village stumbled into town with a sealed warning.
The standing circle on Oldwood Hill has begun pointing like a compass needle.
An underwater cave reported by divers contains the remains of a massive sea creature with unnatural wounds.
A sealed letter from a dead king was found sewn into the lining of an old throne.
The old lighthouse began shining light during the day, pointing toward a specific point in the sea.
A tree in the heart of winter has begun growing fruit containing tiny carved faces.
An abandoned forge has begun running by itself, producing blades of unknown alloy.
A sealed wagon left in the market square by a merchant who disappeared has begun radiating cold.
An old map found in a burning house showed a location that does not exist on any known chart.
A cave painting in the western hills depicts a constellation that has now appeared in the sky.
The ghost of the old magistrate has been seen drawing patterns in the dust at the courthouse.
A sealed amphora on a sunken ship contains an ancient invocations that bleeds red when read.
A village elder's dreams are becoming real as he wakes.
A sealed shrine in the mountains contains a weapon that hums in the presence of demons.
An abandoned watchtower on the border has signals again but no one is inside.
A book found on a dead traveler contains a page that updates itself each day.
A sealed mine shaft has begun exhaling a green fog that makes plants grow impossibly fast.
The bones in the town ossuary have been rearranging themselves into a map.
A knight who died three years ago was seen riding through the western pass.
A sealed message in a bottle was caught in the river net, begging for help from below.
An ancient tree split open revealing a stone staircase descending into darkness.
A dragon was spotted teaching young drakes to breathe fire in the northern crags.
A forbidden library was discovered behind a false wall in the temple, sealed with arcane locks.
The ghost ship seen offshore was identified as one that sank seventy years ago.
A hunter found claw marks on trees that were carved by something with too many fingers.
A sealed underground river resurged through a crack in the town square.
An old widow claims her husband's ghost needs her to deliver something to the capital.
A sealed chest at the bottom of the town well is inscribed with a royal seal.
The northern bridge collapsed and revealed ancient stonework beneath it.
A caravan of undead merchants crosses the salt flats every new moon selling cursed goods.
A buried temple was uncovered by a landslide and locals have begun experiencing visions.
A sealed crypt contains a skeleton clutching a map to a forgotten treasure vault.
An abandoned siege weapon has begun activating on its own each night at midnight.
A traveling sword claims it was forged to kill a god and is seeking its last target.
A sealed cave contains murals depicting the town's destruction.
The old mine's deep levels have begun producing ore that changes shape overnight.
A black knight challenges anyone who crosses the southern bridge to single combat.
A sealed jar contains a demon bound centuries ago and the seal is weakening.
An ancient war machine rises from the lake bed every century and today is the day.
A hermit in the mountains has an artifact that can supposedly see the future.
A sealed letter on a corpse at the crossroads warns of a conspiracy in the royal court.
The old abbey's catacombs connect to a vast network of tunnels beneath the region.
A dragon egg was found abandoned on a mountaintop, pulsing with heat.
A sealed obelisk at the crossroads hums louder as the solstice approaches.
A necromancer is rumored to be operating from the catacombs beneath the cemetery.
An old explorer's journal found in an attic describes a shortcut through the Shadowfell.
A sealed vault in the old keep requires three keys held by three dangerous creatures.
The king's road is haunted by a figure who tests travelers with riddles.
A sealed cavern in the swamp contains an ancient plague sealed away a thousand years ago.
A blacksmith has been forging weapons from metal that fell from the sky.
An acolyte found a hidden chapel beneath the temple that has never been mentioned in records.
A sealed tomb cursed by the old gods has cracked open during the last storm.
The eastern sea has been receding, revealing ruins of a city no one knew existed.
A sealed chest from a sunken ship contains contracts written in infernal script.
A hunter discovered that the wolves in the forest are being led by a creature that walks on two legs.
An ancient prison island has been spotted where charts say only open water exists.
A sealed warning found in a dead courier's pack mentions an invasion from beneath.
A knight's ghost seeks the return of his family sword from a bandit camp.
A sealed crumbling wall exposed a mosaic describing a war between gods.
A missing expedition is rumored to have discovered a lost city deep in the jungle.
The old god statue at the city's center is pointing toward an unexplored region.
A sealed door in the cliffside contains breathing from the other side.
A red star has appeared that was not there before and astrologers are concerned.
A sealed chamber in the deep mines contains a creature that has been sleeping for centuries.
An artifact stolen from a noble's collection is said to be hidden in a sunken fortress.
A sealed shrine in the desert contains an offering that replenishes itself each morning.
The old ruins have begun drawing animals inside who never return.
A wandering sage is looking for brave souls to explore a newly discovered ruin.
A sealed well in the asylum contains something that whispers prayers in a dead language.
An elemental has escaped its binding somewhere in the forest.
The town's ancient charter contains a clause about a threat that awakens every millennium.
A coherent message in a stone's carving claims there is treasure beneath the old fortress.
A sealed ship in a bottle has somehow become a real shipwreck offshore.
An old warrior's ghost appears annually on a specific hill, fighting an invisible enemy.
A sealed tunnel system beneath the city connects to an ancient dwarven stronghold.
A band of goblins is rumored to be transporting something enormous through the forest.
faction_intrigue: The Blackthorn family is quietly buying up land along the river border.
A high-ranking member of the church has been secretly meeting with known criminals.
The merchants' guild is split between two factions vying for control.
An emissary from the northern kingdom was seen entering the thieves' guild headquarters.
The town guard captain owes a substantial debt to a loan shark.
The two oldest noble houses are secretly negotiating a marriage alliance.
The temple of Light has accused the temple of Shadows of practicing forbidden rites.
A spy from the eastern empire has infiltrated the town council.
The alchemists' guild refuses to sell potions to soldiers and no one knows why.
A faction within the city guard is planning to overthrow the captain.
The harbor master has been collecting double duties from foreign ships.
A group of nobles has formed a secret society that meets in a private cellar.
The madam of the foxglove brothel is rumored to know everyone's secrets.
A faction of priests claims the current bishop is an imposter.
The miners' union is planning to strike and the lord is unaware.
A mysterious benefactor has been funding both sides of a brewing conflict.
The old chancellor was replaced despite having the king's favor.
A knight order has been recalled to the capital without public explanation.
A guild of shipwrights has been building vessels that don't appear on any registry.
The town's two rival taverns have begun hiring bouncers in unusual numbers.
A group of young nobles has sworn a secret oath to a forgotten deity.
The lord's advisor has been passing coded messages through merchant caravans.
Two rival assassins' guilds are on the verge of open war in the district.
A faction of scholars has been secretly translating a text banned by the church.
A smuggler captain has allied with pirates against the coastal patrol.
The treasury clerk has been re-inking ledgers from two years ago.
A dissident bard has been stirring the working class with politically charged songs.
The queen's handmaid has been sending letters to a rival kingdom.
A noble house has disinherited its eldest heir for unknown reasons.
A secret organization has been exposing corruption in the watch, one officer at a time.
The port authority has been waving tariffs for specific foreign vessels.
A retired general is quietly recruiting mercenaries in the tavern district.
The bishop's personal guard was doubled after an anonymous threat was delivered.
A rivalry between two sorcerers has turned violent in the academy quarter.
The king has named a successor that no one expected and some nobles are upset.
A master thief has been stealing from the wealthy and donating anonymously to the poor.
The captain of the guard has sealed all records of his early career.
A party of adventurers has been contracted by the crown but their mission is classified.
The town's charter is being rewritten behind closed doors.
A prominent merchant is secretly funding a rebellion in a neighboring province.
The old duke's will was contested by a previously unknown relative from abroad.
A rival kingdom's spy has become friends with the local garrison commander.
A charismatic preacher is drawing crowds and making veiled criticisms of the nobility.
The lord's wife has been holding private audiences with foreign ambassadors.
A faction of soldiers plans to defect to the neighboring kingdom with strategic maps.
The town's architect designed secret passages into the lord's manor.
Two competing trade guilds have locked their workers out of the market.
The court wizard has been replaced by a mysterious figure with no known history.
A secret pact between the temple and the thieves' guild has been discovered by a third party.
The young lord is secretly training a private army.
A black cart has been visiting the estate of a powerful noble every midnight.
The oldest noble family is rumored to have deep ties to the criminal underworld.
An intercepted letter revealed that two council members are on the payroll of a rival city.
A military commander is fortifying a position that was ordered to be abandoned.
The royal hunt master has been stockpiling weapons in the supply wagons.
A ghost of a murdered noble has been seen pointing at different lords on different nights.
The archivist is hiding records that could prove a noble family's claim is fraudulent.
A secret treaty between two rival kingdoms was signed using a neutral lord's seal.
The queen's brother has been seen entering the city through a tunnel used only by smugglers.
A paladin order has been excommunicated after discovering corruption in the church leadership.
The harbor has been allowing ships from an embargoed kingdom to dock in exchange for bribes.
A caravan was stolen and it carried a noble's private correspondence.
A prominent banker has been financing both a rebellion and the forces suppressing it.
The lord's personal physician was replaced three times in one month.
A knock on a tavern door in a specific pattern signals a secret meeting.
The old bridge collapse was rumored to be sabotage by a rival lord.
A guildmaster disappeared after refusing to share profits with a noble house.
The royal messenger who carried the declaration of war was found poisoned in a ditch.
A powerful wizard's apprentice has been selling secrets to competing academies.
The town crier has been censored, and his replacement only makes approved announcements.
A noble family's coat of arms was found painted on the site of a massacre.
The lord's council has been divided on whether to declare independence from the crown.
A high priest has barred nobles from a sacred ceremony for the first time in history.
A masked figure has been paying informants on both sides of a brewing conflict.
The court jester has been whispering secrets to anyone who will listen.
A general has been corresponding with an enemy commander under a false name.
The mayor's office was broken into but nothing was taken except a letter from a foreign power.
A group of merchants has established a private militia beneath the guise of a boxing club.
The old lord's former squire is now a powerful cleric with grievances.
A dispute over mines has escalated into a proxy war between two noble houses.
The herald has been assigning unfamiliar coats of arms to visiting nobles.
A conservative faction of mages wants to outlaw certain schools of magic.
The crown prince has been seen gambling in disguise with known revolutionaries.
A faction within the temple wants to declare a new holy war.
The town designed by an architect loyal to the crown has a secret weakness in its walls.
A spy network recently uncovered turned out to be funded by the lord's own spymaster.
The region's wine guild is split over whether to trade with an enemy nation.
A noble child was sent far away and the household staff was replaced.
Two rival merchant families have been feuding over a trade monopoly for three generations.
A retired spy is said to possess a ledger listing every secret in the realm.
The border patrol has been looking the other way during specific hours.
A faction within the nobility is seeking to usurp the throne with foreign support.
The old wizard's will names an heir no one has ever heard of.
A powerful guild has been influencing elections in the neighboring city.
The lord's twin secretly rules as a puppet while the real lord is imprisoned.
A cryptic message in the town square was signed by a dissolved rebel group.
The crown has been replacing local lords with loyalists one by one.
A sealed alliance between a noble house and a dragon was found in the royal library.
A black market dealer was arrested carrying letters addressed to the queen under her maiden name.
The city gates were closed for a day last month with no explanation given.
A defector from the eastern army claims the king is already dead and a body double sits the throne.
A merchant guildmaster wears a ring identifying him as a member of a forgotten empire's nobility.
A masked ball was held for thirty guests and no one will say who attended.
The lord's personal diary was stolen, and a bounty has been offered but no one has claimed it.
A conspiracy among the city's architects has left hidden passages in every major building.
The border fort was designed by a traitor and its blueprints reveal a fatal weakness.
A noble house is importing weapons under the guise of grain shipments.
The crown's spymaster has vanished and some say the king himself ordered the disappearance.
A cult growing in the slums openly follows a deity once banished from the realm.
Two old enemies signed a treaty sealed with the blood of a child.
The character witness at a noble's trial was bribed in a tavern the night before.
A traveling minstrel is carrying coded messages between rebel leaders.
The lord's campaign to burn witches is targeting political rivals.
A message intercepted on the king's road warned of a plot against the church.
The queen's personal guard was found drunk and their uniforms stolen.
A secret wedding united two rival noble families and neither side wants it known.
The admiral of the fleet has been sailing toward a fleet of unknown ships rather than away.
An investigation into missing tax revenue led to a door that opened into a secret vault.
The town's elite have been receiving anonymous letters containing evidence of their crimes.
A baker found a hollow loaf containing a message bearing the seal of a rival kingdom.
The blackguard was seen wearing the personal crest of a lord he served and then killed.
supernatural: The dead have been walking near the old battlefield every night since the new moon.
Fish caught in the northern river have silver eyes that reflect scenes above the water.
An entire field of crops grew overnight and the grain tastes of ash and honey.
A ghostly ship passes through the harbor but cannot be boarded.
The wind howls in a language the old scholars can almost understand.
Shadows in the eastern alley move against the light and have no caster.
A woman in the crowd was seen floating three inches above the ground.
A farmer's cow gave birth to a calf with two heads and both spoke the farmer's secrets.
A child drowned last year was seen playing by the river, dry and smiling.
The moon turned red for three nights and livestock were born with strange markings.
A demon summoned by an apprentice now poses as a local priest.
The old well grants visions of the future to anyone who looks into it at midnight.
A graveyard statue weeps blood every dawn, and the blood forms words on the ground.
The same dream of a burning city plaguing multiple townspeople simultaneously.
A thick fog descended on the western quarter and those who entered it aged ten years.
A ghost of a dragon circles the ruined fortress, roaring silently.
Three suns appeared in the sky for an hour and everyone who looked went blind for a day.
A witch's hut appeared at the forest edge and disappeared the next morning, leaving sick flowers.
A river ran backward for a day, revealing ancient bones along its bed.
The old enchanted armor in the hall armor walks the corridors at night.
A boy born without a shadow tells anyone who listens what they most fear.
A coven of hags has been brewing storms from the abandoned watchtower.
The church organ plays itself when the bishop is in the building.
A necromancer was spotted near the cemetery but vanished when approached.
Crows speak in unison before a major death in town.
A doppelganger replaced the merchant and was only discovered when his scales itched.
The ancient oak door in the forest opens onto impossible rooms.
A banshee was heard wailing exactly before the lord's son had an accident.
A grave was found opened from the inside with the coffin scratched from within.
A plague of locusts formed the shape of a great eye while flying over the town.
The village spring grants miraculous healing but each cure costs a memory.
A ghostly knight challenges passersby to a duel and vanishes if refused.
The haunted manor at the edge of town occasionally emits screams and music simultaneously.
A cursed painting in the keeper's collection watches observers from inside.
A traveling mirror reflects the viewer as they will appear one year from now.
A house on Elm Street appears and disappears on the solstice.
The sound of a woman singing echoes from the sealed cellars beneath the apothecary.
A child drew a picture of the thing she saw underneath her bed, and it matched a demonic sigil.
A ring found on a victim of the plague grants wild magic when worn.
The cemetery gates open on their own when a resident is about to die.
A clan of werewolves has been living among the town's butchers for generations.
A ghost train passes through the town at 3 AM and anyone who boards must return by dawn.
The old vellum book in the library writes its own new chapters every night.
Fog in the forest takes the shape of the traveler's dead loved ones.
A sprite has been stealing the names of children and only returns them for a smile.
A shadowy figure sits at the head of every table during dinner and no one can see it.
The ruins begin to repair themselves when no one is watching.
A phantom army marches through the valley and any who join never return.
A ring of mushrooms appeared overnight around the old battle site and glow at night.
The tomb of the old queen contains an empty coffin and fresh flowers.
A spirit trapped in a lantern has been whispering to the shopkeeper at night.
A hydra's skeleton in the museum was found to have regrown one head overnight.
The dead birds in the market square all face the same direction.
Any blood spilled on the stones of the old circle is absorbed instantly.
A coven performs rituals under the full moon in the ruins of the old chapel.
A man cursed to be invisible has been begging for help at the cathedral door.
The nightmares plaguing the town all share the same location: a door in a dark corridor.
A statue of the harvest god was seen walking the fields at dawn.
A banshee in the water tower gives warnings before each tragedy.
The bones of the old king's enemies rattle in the dungeon when a usurper sits the throne.
A ghostly figure leaves golden coins on the graves of the forgotten dead.
The witch lights on the forest path ignite blue when danger is near.
A crypt full of green vapor opened and a figure of pure light stepped out.
The old vampire crypt beneath the church has begun to warm despite the absence of bodies.
A circle of salt drawn around the magistrate's house dissolved despite no wind.
A nightmare creature was summoned from a painting by a careless mage.
A woman's reflection in the water is not her own.
The shadows of the gallows tree move during execution even when no one hangs there.
A cursed bone dagger whispers its next victim when drawn.
The old alchemist's final experiment left a green fire in his laboratory that cannot be extinguished.
A hydra that drowned in the river left footprints along the bank every equinox.
The ruins at the top of the hill are visible only to those who are about to die.
A ghost child has been collecting stones and building them into walls around the town.
The temple cat has been staring at an empty corner and hissing at nothing for weeks.
A ghoul was captured in the cemetery and it speaks with the voice of the old sexton.
The old inn's mirror shows the room as it looked a hundred years ago.
A phoenix feather was found burning on the church steps and did not turn to ash for three days.
A stone idol weeps black tears and the tears dissolve anything they touch.
The wind carries the sound of a battle that has not yet happened.
A haunting melody plays from the abandoned manor and those who follow it go mad.
An undead knight guards a crossroads and will only let the worthy pass.
A haunted painting changes to show the viewer's death.
The wizard's familiar, a raven, speaks of events that have not yet come to pass.
A phantom ship materializes one mile offshore during lightning storms.
The ancient oak tree bleeds when cut and whispers warnings in a forgotten tongue.
A ghostly library appears in the fog on the anniversary of a great fire.
The river spirit demands a sacrifice each spring and the town has forgotten to pay.
A lich's phylactery was buried beneath the town and the land itself is dying slowly.
A skull found on the riverbank when worn as a helmet shows the wearer terrible truths.
The moon casts shadows that point toward hidden graves.
A warlock's pact with a shadow creature has corrupted the local plants.
Bats around the old tower have been flying in patterns that form runes.
A spirit trapped in a music box plays a song that opens a sealed door three streets away.
The ghost of a drowned fisherman trades secrets for prayers.
A relic from the old wars radiates cold that no fire can warm.
An illusionary army was projected over the city walls to trick an approaching scout.
The town well went dry and was filled with letters from the dead.
A devil's contract signed in the town hall was found sealed behind the walls.
A child prodigy aged fifty years overnight and remembers nothing of the time in between.
A giant skeletal hand was found clawing its way out of the earth near the quarry.
A sigil carved into the town square glows with imprisoned magic on certain nights.
A ghost ship appears at the river bend only after a local child goes missing.
The boundary stones around the county are inscribed with names of the forgotten dead.
A grimoire found in a hollow tree absorbs any book placed next to it.
A spirit of vengeance has been killing people who committed crimes decades ago.
The old dig site released a spectral hound that hunts at night.
A shadow creature in the attic was feeding on the fear of the household's youngest.
The prayers from the condemned prisoners materialized as black ravens circling the jail.
A mountain on the horizon casts no shadow for an hour each sunset.
A sealed jar found in a coffin contains a still-beating heart.
The bones of the old healer were found arranged into a map of the underground rivers.
A phantom bell rings when the town is in the greatest danger.
A cursed deck of cards predicts death for anyone who draws the wrong card.
Ghosts of the old war appear before each change in the weather.
A spectral army was seen marching toward the old battlefield.
An ancient monolith absorbed the light around it and made the entire region darker.
A vampire has been attending church services disguised as a visiting noble.
A berserker's ghost hunts the woods and attacks anyone who enters with an axe.
A circle of summoning was found in the cellar of the abandoned asylum.
The blood spilled in the old battle seeps up through the cobblestones every anniversary.
A spirit trapped in a gemstone grants wishes but twists them horribly.
The pool in the temple garden reflects a different sky than the one above.
A necromantic plague has been raising animals killed on the road.
The village elder fails to cast a reflection on moonless nights.
A dragur was sealed under the old bridge and its hunger shakes the stones.
An ancient curse has made the entire town forget the name of their first great hero.
A ghost of a murdered woman appears at the window of the magistrate who let her killer go free.
trade_economy: A merchant caravan went missing on the northern road three days ago.
The price of iron has doubled since the mines went silent last month.
A foreign trading company has been offering goods at half the market rate.
Grain shipments from the eastern farms have been delayed by bandits.
A rare spice has appeared on the market that only grows in distant lands.
The harbor master is charging double the usual docking fees.
Shortage of lumber has stalled construction across the district.
A new trade route through the mountains has been opened by a daring merchant.
The ale houses are running low on hops after a blight hit the southern fields.
A shipment of silk was stolen from the warehouse and is now sold on the black market.
Silver coins have been circulating that are slightly lighter than they should be.
The merchant guild has imposed a secret tariff on imported linen.
A plague of rats has destroyed half the grain stores in the warehouse district.
The price of fish has tripled in the last two weeks.
A caravan from the desert is selling enchanted water that never runs out.
Smugglers have been bringing untaxed goods through the coastal caves.
A local mine reopened and is offering ore at prices that undercut every rival.
The wool trade collapsed after a disease hit the shepherd flocks.
A wealthy merchant is buying up all the salt in preparation for winter.
Shipments of saltpeter have been seized at the border for unknown reasons.
A traveling merchant is selling maps to a supposed gold mine.
The leather guild has been accused of using inferior hides for premium prices.
A shipment of wine from the northern vineyard arrived entirely spoiled.
Copper exports have dropped since the river became too shallow for barges.
A new tariff on imported steel has angered the blacksmiths' guild.
The price of parchment has soared after the only mill in the region flooded.
A caravan route through the Trollhollow has made travel faster but far more dangerous.
The dock workers are demanding higher wages and threaten to strike.
A merchant house has gone bankrupt leaving citizens with worthless promissory notes.
A surge in demand for healing potions has driven their price beyond the reach of the poor.
The gem dealer was found to be selling cut glass as genuine stones.
A trade embargo with the neighboring kingdom has starved the town of copper.
The price of livestock has fallen after a rumor of disease spread through the market.
A consortium of merchants has cornered the market on lamp oil.
The price of wheat is at an all-time low due to an unprecedented harvest.
Foreign merchants are buying local handicrafts and reselling them abroad at huge markups.
A new tax on river barges is making goods from upstream more expensive.
The spice trade has been interrupted by a naval blockade.
A wealthy trader is offering to pay above market rate for any goods suitable for export.
The local brewery has been accused of diluting its beer to increase profits.
A recent landslide has blocked the mountain pass and raised transport costs.
The copper mines have been producing ore that crumbles to dust when smelted.
A merchant fleet was lost at sea and insurance premiums have skyrocketed.
A new type of strong steel from the eastern forges has undercut local blacksmiths.
The fur trade has declined sharply after huntsmen found empty forests.
A grain shipment was rejected by the military and dumped on the open market at low prices.
A merchant consortium has proposed a monopoly on the spice trade.
Rumors of a new gold deposit have triggered a rush of prospectors.
The guild of shipbuilders is refusing to sell vessels to foreign merchants.
A batch of imported dye proved to be toxic and has caused skin rashes throughout the market.
The price of coal has risen sharply after one of the mines collapsed.
A smuggler vessel was captured carrying a fortune in stolen silver.
New trade agreements with the eastern empire have lowered the price of silk but angered local weavers.
A local banker has been lending money to merchants at exorbitant interest rates.
The wine harvest this year promises to be the best in a generation.
A caravan from the south is selling exotic animals at the market.
The cost of hiring guards for caravans has doubled after a series of ambushes.
A merchant was caught selling spoiled meat to the garrison.
A shortage of skilled coopers has slowed the barrel trade.
The barge unions are negotiating for better shares of the river trade profits.
A new canal project promises to reduce transport costs by half.
The ironworks has been dumping slag into the river and polluting the downstream farms.
A commodity broker is offering to trade exotic goods without questions.
The salt mines have been seized by the crown and prices have tripled.
A merchant vessel arrived carrying a cargo of books from a civilization thought lost.
The town's economy is dependent on a single trade good that is running out.
A counterfeiting ring has been flooding the region with fake silver coins.
Sales of weapons and armor have increased after a conflict was spotted on the border.
A new trade road through the eastern hills has attracted merchants from distant lands.
The price of sailcloth has risen after a storm destroyed the flax harvest.
A merchant was discovered selling cursed items to unsuspecting buyers.
Grain reserves are sufficient for only six weeks.
The shipping guild is locking out non-members from the new commercial piers.
A new partnership between two merchant houses is threatening smaller traders.
The town mint has been producing coins with less silver than the old ones.
A caravan route that was dormant for decades has been revived by a merchant prince.
The price of imported spices has fallen after a naval victory cleared the sea lanes.
A guild of textile workers is threatening to sabotage looms if wages are not raised.
The local potters are struggling to source quality clay after a cave-in.
A wealthy patron is sponsoring a new trade expedition across the eastern desert.
The river trade has slowed because pirates have been spotted upstream.
A merchant company has begun offering credit to small traders at competitive rates.
The new overland route to the capital is shorter but passes through hostile territory.
A trade delegation from a distant kingdom has demanded exclusive trading rights.
The copper shortage has forced the mint to issue tokens instead of coins.
A major warehouse fire destroyed goods worth more than the town's annual revenue.
The tanners guild has been dumping waste and poisoning the water supply.
A new banking house is offering letters of credit that are accepted across the region.
The road tolls have been raised, making overland trade unprofitable for many goods.
A merchant bought an entire silk shipment and is holding it to sell at peak prices.
The local fishery has been overfishing and the catch this year is a quarter of last year.
A trade route through the hills has long been rumored to contain the ruins of a lost trading city.
The cost of importing steel has made local weapon production unprofitable.
A smuggler's cache was discovered containing goods from a dozen nations.
A new market square is being built to replace the old one, and traders fear displacement.
The tea trade has been disrupted by a rebellion in the southern plantations.
A merchant fleet from the west has introduced new crops that thrive in the local climate.
The price of adamantine has reached new heights after a demand surge from the dwarven kingdoms.
A consortium has taken over the mines and is restricting supply to keep prices high.
The local economy depends on seasonal trade fairs and this year's fair has been postponed.
A new ship class has been introduced that can carry twice the cargo.
The war has disrupted the supply chain for a critical trade good.
A merchant discovered that his entire shipment of grain has been confiscated by the lord's soldiers.
The price of labor has risen since skilled workers began emigrating to the capital.
A trade secret from a glassmaker was stolen and is now being used by a competitor.
A merchant port is expanding its docks and offering incentives for foreign trade.
The price of imported grain is cheaper than locally grown, angering the farmers.
A caravan of clockwork goods has arrived from a land thought to be a myth.
The government has imposed a luxury tax that is strangling the trade in fine goods.
A merchant guild is hoarding saltpeter and will sell only to their allies.
The cost of land transport exceeds the value of many bulk goods.
A new merchant code is being enforced that limits how goods can be sold.
An ancient debt owed to a trader has been called in at the worst possible time.
The insurance rate on merchant ships has skyrocketed after the last storm.
A merchant is selling information about the safest routes and will pay gold for more.
The town has no ships of its own and must depend entirely on foreign merchants.
A trade delegation is demanding access to the region's only source of a rare mineral.
The merchant marine has been depleted as sailors are recruited for a warship fleet.
A bumper harvest has driven the price of crops so low that farmers face ruin.
A new law requires all goods passing through the town gate to be inspected, slowing trade.
The trading post at the crossroads is the only source of supplies for three days travel.
A merchant has begun selling goods on credit but collecting debts with hired muscle.
